release_notes: V14.39 build 186 12-hour trend and mini-trend backfill patch: removes the 24-hour history option for MSP4021 stability, keeps selectable 4h, 8h and 12h Trend and Insulin Activity windows, clamps any saved 24h setting back to 12h, restores the 1-hour main glucose mini trend as a separate raw timestamped FIFO buffer, adds a dedicated 1-hour Nightscout backfill path, clears zero-only mini-trend caches, and preserves the build 183/185 WiFi and Nightscout recovery logic.
